# Python dependencies for the ms-gartner-deck build scripts.
#
# Install:
#   pip install -r scripts/requirements.txt
#   python -m playwright install chromium   # only needed for build_pdf.py
#
# Per script:
#   build_html.py   standard library only
#   build_pdf.py    playwright
#   build_pptx.py   python-pptx, lxml

playwright>=1.40,<2.0
python-pptx>=0.6.21,<1.1
lxml>=4.9,<6.0
